/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/application_test.dir/application_test.cpp.o -o application_test   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib ../../src/modeling/libmodeling.a ../../src/application/libapplication.a ../../src/modeling/libmodeling.a ../../src/assets/libassets.a ../../external/libstb_image.a ../../external/libtinyobjloader.a ../../external/libimgui.a ../../external/libglad.a -framework OpenGL -lSDL2 /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib
